allow:
Bash(git commit -m "Update email branding from Next Commerce to myBidly

- Replace all ''Powered by Next Commerce'' with ''Powered by myBidly''
- Update links to point to mybidly.vercel.app (staging) instead of next-commerce.io
- Affects all email templates: customer confirmations, shop owner notifications, etc.")

Bash(git commit -m "Fix widget view tracking, pending payout NaN, and update production URLs

1. Widget View Tracking Fix:
   - Preview views in dashboard are NO LONGER counted
   - Only count views when widget is embedded on actual customer websites
   - Detects if referer is from mybidly.io or mybidly.vercel.app and skips tracking
   - This ensures accurate Widget Views metric

2. Pending Payout Banner Fix:
   - Fix €NaN display by explicitly selecting pendingPayouts field from database
   - Add fallback to 0 if pendingPayouts is null/undefined
   - Banner now displays correct amount (e.g., €25.00)

3. Email Branding Update:
   - Update all email template links from mybidly.vercel.app to mybidly.io
   - ''Powered by myBidly'' now links to production URL
   - Affects all customer and shop owner email templates (20+ templates)

4. Documentation:
   - Add STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SETUP.md guide for staging testing")
